section.title: Part 1: Booking a Hotel
section.transcript:
Receptionist: Good afternoon, how can I help?
Guest: I'd like to book a room for [1] nights.
Receptionist: Certainly. And your name?
Guest: My name is [2] Johnson.
Receptionist: Could I take your phone number?
Guest: Yes, it's [3].
Receptionist: And what type of room would you like?
Guest: A [4] room please.
Receptionist: That will be [5] per night.
section._comment_transcript: Use [1], [2], [N] to mark where answers appear in the transcript.

questions._comment_type: Gap Fill — text with ___ blank, answer fills the blank
questions.content: The guest wants to stay for ___ nights.
questions.explanation: The guest says '3 nights' in the recording.
questions.group_instruction: Questions 1-5: Complete the form below. Write NO MORE THAN ONE WORD AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.

questions.explanation: The guest gives the name David Johnson.

questions.content: What type of room does the guest want?
questions.explanation: The guest asks for a double room.
questions.group_instruction: Questions 4-6: Choose the correct letter A, B or C.

questions._comment_type: Table/Form/Note Completion — fill in table cell
Multiple Select — choose N from options, correct_answer pipe-separated
questions.content: Which TWO facilities does the hotel offer?
questions.explanation: The hotel offers free parking (A) and a gym (D).

questions.content: Which THREE services are included in the breakfast?
questions.explanation: Breakfast includes items B, C and E.

questions.content: Guests can check in from ___ o'clock.
